steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The conversion factor is 100 centimeters = 1 meter. To convert centimeters to meters, divide by 100.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Verify the unit direction: dividing by 100 makes the number smaller, which is correct since a meter is larger than a centimeter.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• $0.022$ — this is far too small; dividing by 100 does not yield a value less than 1 for 4,600 cm; incorrect.
  • The matching choice: $46$ — $4600 \div 100 = 46$. B is correct.
  • $4{,}700$ — this is larger than the original number of centimeters and goes in the wrong direction; incorrect.
  • $460{,}000$ — this would result from multiplying by 100 instead of dividing; incorrect.
